faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Flowa. Can't find the answer? Contact our 24/7 support team.

items.question: Is Flowa suitable for my industry?
items.answer: Flowa supports 42+ industries with dedicated compliance rules — from Healthcare, Finance, Real Estate to F&B, Education and E-commerce. AI has built-in Industry Compliance to create legally compliant content for each industry.

items.question: Can AI maintain my brand's tone of voice?
items.answer: Absolutely! Set up your Brand Template with tone of voice, formality level, preferred/forbidden words. AI will learn and maintain consistent voice across all content, no matter who on the team creates it.

items.question: Can I publish directly to social channels?
items.answer: Yes, Flowa integrates with Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Zalo, and many other channels. You can schedule and publish automatically, or review before posting — all from one dashboard.

items.question: Is AI-generated content duplicate?
items.answer: No! Each content is unique, customized to your brand, industry and goals. AI also auto-checks compliance before completing.

items.question: Is my data and content safe?
items.answer: Security is top priority. We use SSL encryption, role-based access control (Admin/Editor/Viewer), and never share your data with third parties. Data is stored on secure servers.

items.question: Can my team collaborate on Flowa?
items.answer: Yes! Flowa supports team collaboration with detailed permissions, content approval workflows, task assignment and Campaign-based progress tracking. Every member can create on-brand content.

items.question: How is Flowa different from ChatGPT or other AI tools?
items.answer: ChatGPT is a general-purpose AI tool. Flowa is purpose-built for Content Marketing with: Brand Voice Management, automatic Industry Compliance, Content Calendar, Multi-channel publishing and Team Collaboration — all in one platform.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to use Flowa?
items.answer: Absolutely not! Flowa is designed for marketers. Intuitive interface, setup takes only 5 minutes and you can start creating content immediately.

items.question: Is Vietnamese supported?
items.answer: Flowa is specially optimized for Vietnamese with AI that understands culture, context and Vietnamese legal regulations. Interface and support are 100% Vietnamese.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Flowa is a global AI Content Marketing platform, helping businesses create quality content faster and more efficiently.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Flowa was founded with a simple mission: to help marketers and businesses worldwide create high-quality content without spending hours every day.
story.p2: We understand that content marketing is the backbone of every digital strategy, but creating consistent, quality content is a major challenge for many teams.
story.p3: With advanced AI technology and deep understanding of the global market, Flowa helps you create multi-channel content in minutes instead of hours.

quote.text: If creativity is a seed within the human mind, then AI is the sunlight and rain – it doesn't create the seed, but helps it sprout and grow tall.
quote.author: Flowa Team

chatbot.welcome:
Hello! 👋 I'm Flowa's **AI Content Strategist**.

I can help you create:
🎬 **TikTok Script** - Video scripts with detailed movement and dialogue
📸 **Carousel** - Image prompts for Facebook/TikTok slides
📱 **Multi-Channel** - Content for Website, Facebook, Instagram, X, Google Maps

💡 **Tip:** Select a Brand Template above so I understand your tone of voice, target personas, and linked products.

What content would you like to create today? ✨

onboarding.step1Desc: I'm an AI assistant helping you find content ideas. Describe your product or topic to get started!
onboarding.step2Desc: Use the 🔍 button to search chat history. Pull down at the top to refresh (on mobile).
onboarding.step3Desc: When AI suggests a topic, click to instantly create Multichannel, Script, or Carousel content!

personalized.withBrand: I'm Flowa's AI Content Strategist. Ready to support **{{brandName}}** with TikTok Scripts, Carousels, and Multi-channel content.
personalized.noBrand: I'm Flowa's AI Content Strategist. Select a Brand Template so I can understand your brand context!
personalized.tipBeginner: Describe your product or choose a suggestion below to get started.
personalized.tipIntermediate: Try the Discovery Tab or ask AI to search for new trends!
personalized.tipExpert: Use "/" to access quick commands or @mention to tag context.
personalized.tipDefault: What can I help you with today?
personalized.activityHint: You've created {{count}} topics. Let's keep going!
